text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
I can't believe camp is over already... It really
went by in a flash.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Next month is the Sprinters S...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Hishi Akebono mentioned that she wanted to
take on the Sprinters S. next.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But we still don't know if she should try to lose
weight and participate in a lower weight class or
tackle it as she is now.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
There's no way of knowing what'll happen in the
future...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: So let's just stay positive, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And with that, my blistering summer camp
experience with Hishi Akebono draws to an end.
